featureName: BUG-058-EXTERNAL-INFRA-MISSING: Four external-infrastructure gaps blocking spec 058 completion

executionHistory.summary: Verified the four external-infrastructure gaps: (1) extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/ missing (Playwright harness from F-057-V-001); (2) live-Postgres integration harness not wired into ./smackerel.sh test integration; (3) shared HTMX admin scaffolding does not exist (JSON handler for /v1/admin/extension/devices is mounted but no HTMX surface); (4) SCN-058-019 sideload walkthrough is manual-only with no automation path.

Filed bug.md, spec.md (5 acceptance criteria covering 4 blockers + unblock signal), report.md. Routed to operator for per-blocker triage. Spec 058 transitioned from done_with_concerns to blocked in same run.

lockdownState.reason: open bug awaiting operator triage to assign owning resolution path for each of the four external-infrastructure blockers

blockers.summary: F-057-V-001 Playwright harness not in repo
blockers.resolutionPath: Land Playwright harness under extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/ via the 057 follow-up scope; then author bookmark_roundtrip.spec.ts + auth_failure.spec.ts.

affectedDoD: Scope 5 admin devices view live aggregation
blockers.evidence: ./smackerel.sh test integration does not stand up a Postgres-backed harness; Scope 2/5 coverage is unit-tier with in-memory fakes
blockers.resolutionPath: Wire ephemeral Postgres-backed harness (testcontainers or isolated compose project) into ./smackerel.sh test integration honoring bubbles-test-environment-isolation; add deferred Scope 2/5 follow-up rows.

affectedDoD: /admin/extension/devices HTMX surface (JSON handler is mounted today)
blockers.evidence: No shared HTMX admin layout / nav fragment / auth gating helper exists in repo; Scope 5 explicitly deferred the HTMX rendering layer
blockers.resolutionPath: Land shared HTMX admin scaffolding (layout, auth gating helper, nav fragment) in a dedicated spec; add per-page partials for tokens and devices on top.

blockers.evidence: Only the 8-step runbook in docs/Operations.md exists; no automated verification path
blockers.resolutionPath: Operator decision: (a) accept manual-only permanently and close as wontfix-automated/doc-validated, OR (b) build CI-side Chrome MV3 sideload smoke harness that loads signed zip, verifies cosign, asserts badge matrix.
